─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Add Phase 5 Perpetual Ledger and implementation scaffolding    2 │    3 │ Major additions:    4 │ - Phase 5 (The Perpetual Ledger): On-chain autonomous generative system    5 │   with pulse/waterfall/manifest architecture (specs + extensions)    6 │ - Implementation apps: identity-playground and cipher-rendering    7 │   (React/TypeScript/Vite with Zustand stores)    8 │ - Master plan and status report with roadmap and cost analysis    9 │ - Updated CLAUDE.md to reflect five-phase architecture and app commands   10 │ - Updated MANIFEST.md to v1.3 with Phase 5 entries and REP-001   11 │ - Added AGENTS.md and GEMINI.md contributor guidelines   12 │   13 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Add SDD specifications for all four phases    2 │    3 │ Specification-Driven Development (SDD) workflow output:    4 │ - Phase 1 (Identity): 5 user stories, 67 implementation tasks    5 │ - Phase 2 (Cipher): 6 user stories, 93 implementation tasks    6 │ - Phase 3 (Mythology): 6 user stories, 93 implementation tasks    7 │ - Phase 4 (Synthesis): 7 user stories, 90 implementation tasks    8 │    9 │ Each phase includes spec.md (requirements), plan.md (architecture),   10 │ and tasks.md (implementation tasks organized by user story priority).   11 │   12 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Add CLAUDE.md for Claude Code guidance    2 │    3 │ Documents repository structure, four-phase architecture,    4 │ core concepts (state machine paradigm, 4444jPP governance,    5 │ φ-operators), and guidelines for working with specifications.    6 │    7 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

─────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────      │ STDIN ─────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────    1 │ Initial commit: Meta-Source Ledger framework    2 │    3 │ Cross-domain creative-technical framework with:    4 │ - 44 annotated documents across 4 phases    5 │ - Identity, cipher, mythology, and synthesis specifications    6 │ - Research prompts and validation frameworks    7 │ - Reorganized following Minimal Root philosophy    8 │    9 │ Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com> ─────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
